name: Americold Realty Trust v. Conagra Foods, Inc., et al.
question: Is the citizenship of a trust for the purposes of diversity jurisdiction based on the diversity of the trust’s beneficiaries (who are its shareholders) as well as the trustees?
description: A case in which the Court determined that, for the purposes of diversity jurisdiction, the citizenship of a trust is based on the citizenship of its members, which includes the beneficiary shareholders as well as the trustees.
